rationale: Re-ran the round-1 hostile ESC/BEL/embedded-newline probes against ad56c295 using a /tmp-built binary. Both the unknown panel.gates key and panel.substitution.substitutes self-map now render the hostile identifier quoted in the recovery text: no raw BEL/ESC bytes reached output, and each error produced only one physical recovery line rather than a forged recovery: line. Focused internal/config tests pass. Spot-check of the remaining new refusal messages found only enum-derived gate labels/indexes/counts or config values already rendered with %q; no new raw config-controlled recovery repeat observed.

findings.summary: Unknown panel.gates key and substitutes self-map key are escaped with strconv.Quote in recovery text; hostile CLI probes showed no raw BEL/ESC and no forgeable physical recovery line.
Regression coverage is present for unknown gate keys with ESC/BEL/newline, and the focused internal/config test run passed.
Spot-check found the other six new refusal messages embed only gate enum labels, numeric indexes/counts, or config-controlled values already formatted with %q.
